name: Harvest
description: A relatively stable source of Glamour. Each dot adds one die to certain rolls related to gathering Glamour.

name: Hollow
description: A private pocket of reality shaped into a stable dwelling in the Hedge — size, amenities, wards, and access points all built from dots.

name: Court Goodwill
description: How well-liked and respected you are within a Court other than your own. Adds dice to social rolls with that Court's members.
